text: B2 RDS - Proxy - When? @ st @ s * Too many connections errors... e DB Instances using T2/T3 (i.e smaller/burst) instances * AWS Lambda ... time saved/connection reuse & IAM Auth * Long running connections (SAAS apps) - low latency * Where resilience to database failure is a priority... ¢ ... RDS proxy can reduce the time for failover ¢ ... and make it transparent to the application
